title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: openssl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for openssl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: OpenSSL is a toolkit that implements the Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) and Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocols, as well as a full-strength general-purpose cryptography library.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): openssl 3.2.2 has 3_4_0 version in the symbol table (JIRA:RHEL-105518)

fixes.description: openssl 3.2.2 has 3_4_0 version in the symbol table

full_text:
An update for openssl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

OpenSSL is a toolkit that implements the Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) and Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocols, as well as a full-strength general-purpose cryptography library.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): openssl 3.2.2 has 3_4_0 version in the symbol table (JIRA:RHEL-105518)
